title: Rich Chinese Potato Stir Fry
description: A rich, crumbly, and indulgent Chinese dish featuring potatoes, perfect for a low-sodium diet. This stir-fry combines the natural sweetness of potatoes with savory Chinese flavors.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the potatoes and cook until they are golden brown, about 5 minutes. Remove from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil. Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and stir-fry until fragrant, about 30 seconds.

Add the cooked potatoes back into the skillet, along with the low-sodium soy sauce, oyster sauce (if using), and salt-free seasoning blend. Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until the potatoes are well coated with the sauce.
Stir in the chopped scallions and cook for an additional minute.
Drizzle the sesame oil over the top of the potato stir-fry and toss to combine.
Serve the Rich Chinese Potato Stir Fry hot, garnished with additional scallions if desired.
